name: gemin-eye
description: Invoke Gemini as a sandboxed review partner from inside Claude Code. Action-shaped subcommands (review, megareview, wip, sanity, name, compare, save). Every prompt follows a rigid ROLE / DO / DON'T / SCOPE / OUTPUT / CONTEXT template. Gemini reviews only — proposed edits return as elaborate code blocks; Claude applies them. Default model `gemini-3.5-flash`; `megareview` uses `gemini-3.5-pro`. Vault-aware (pairs with obsidian-bridge). Outputs route to `gemin-eye/` subfolders only — never source paths.
